name: Kimco Realty Corporation
description: Kimco Realty Corporation is a real estate investment trust and North America’s largest publicly traded owner and operator of high-quality, open-air, grocery-anchored shopping centers and mixed-use properties. Headquartered in Jericho, New York, the company focuses on creating vibrant, community-focused retail environments across the United States. By leveraging a portfolio of strategically located assets, Kimco provides essential retail space to a diverse range of tenants, aiming to deliver long-term value to its shareholders through disciplined capital allocation, operational excellence, and a commitment to sustainable growth within the retail real estate sector.
